# The Fuglys

> Wasteland Weirdos, Wild Adventures, Zero Regrets!

The Fuglys is a post-apocalyptic animated series and book universe created by The Metavision Multimedia Limited. It follows a ragtag crew of misfits, scavengers, and troublemakers navigating life in a wasteland trailer park called The Pits.

## The Series

The Fuglys animated series is available on YouTube, featuring character spotlights, behind-the-scenes content, and episodic adventures. The companion book series expands the universe with stories of survival, dark comedy, and the unbreakable bonds of a found family.

## Core Characters (The Core Six)

- **Luna** (Age 13) — The Heart. A dreamer who finds beauty in the broken.
- **Flint** (Age 14) — The Brains. Scrawny, resourceful, and always up to no good.
- **Axel** (Age 9) — The Hurricane. Pint-sized and ready to throw hands.
- **Big Ma** (Age 62) — The Matriarch. No-nonsense medic with a heart of gold.
- **Billy Ray** (Age 52) — The Handyman. Steady, dependable, and cleaning up after Bud.
- **Bud** (Age 48) — The Chaos Agent. Wild charm and a perpetual grin for days.

## Extended Cast

Over 30 characters including survivors, creatures, and villains populate the wasteland — from Blister the mutant possum to Scorch, the cunning leader of the Fever Foxes.

## Official Merch

The Fuglys merch features character apparel, collectible stickers, enamel pins, art prints, and accessories — all available at thefuglys.com/merch.

## Parent Company

The Fuglys is a brand of The Metavision Multimedia Limited, a UK-based AI creative agency. Learn more at https://themetavision.co.uk
